{{Expand}}

{{Infobox territory
| name = Lirial's Territory
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Lirial]]'s body becomes the crystal key to her [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Territories]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
